title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services:
Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services!
